scenario: Verify that display succeeds with valid email
expected_result: Display operation completes successfully with valid email

scenario: Verify that display succeeds with valid password
expected_result: Display operation completes successfully with valid password

scenario: Verify display operation with all valid inputs
expected_result: Display completes and returns success response

scenario: Verify that login succeeds with valid email
expected_result: Login operation completes successfully with valid email

scenario: Verify that login succeeds with valid password
expected_result: Login operation completes successfully with valid password

scenario: Verify login operation with all valid inputs
expected_result: Login completes and returns success response

scenario: Verify error when email is missing
expected_result: System returns validation error indicating email is required

scenario: Verify error when email is empty
expected_result: System rejects empty email with appropriate error message

scenario: Verify error when email has invalid format
expected_result: System rejects invalid email format and shows format hint

scenario: Verify error when password is missing
expected_result: System returns validation error indicating password is required

scenario: Verify error when password is empty
expected_result: System rejects empty password with appropriate error message

scenario: Verify error when password has invalid format
expected_result: System rejects invalid password format and shows format hint

scenario: Verify email at minimum allowed length (1 character)
expected_result: System accepts email at minimum boundary

scenario: Verify email at maximum allowed length
expected_result: System accepts email at maximum boundary

scenario: Verify email exceeding maximum allowed length
expected_result: System rejects email exceeding maximum length with error

scenario: Verify password at minimum allowed length (1 character)
expected_result: System accepts password at minimum boundary

scenario: Verify password at maximum allowed length
expected_result: System accepts password at maximum boundary

scenario: Verify password exceeding maximum allowed length
expected_result: System rejects password exceeding maximum length with error

scenario: Verify email with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace and validates email correctly

scenario: Verify email with Unicode / special characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode in email without crashing

scenario: Verify password with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace and validates password correctly

scenario: Verify password with Unicode / special characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode in password without crashing

scenario: Verify duplicate display request handling (idempotency)
expected_result: System handles duplicate display gracefully without data corruption

scenario: Verify display under concurrent access
expected_result: System maintains data integrity during concurrent display operations

scenario: Verify duplicate login request handling (idempotency)
expected_result: System handles duplicate login gracefully without data corruption

scenario: Verify login under concurrent access
expected_result: System maintains data integrity during concurrent login operations

scenario: Verify SQL injection attempt in email — input: ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises input and rejects SQL injection in email

scenario: Verify XSS attempt in email — input: <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System sanitises HTML/JS and prevents XSS via email

scenario: Verify SQL injection attempt in password — input: ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises input and rejects SQL injection in password

scenario: Verify XSS attempt in password — input: <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System sanitises HTML/JS and prevents XSS via password

scenario: Verify display is not accessible without authentication
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthenticated display attempt

scenario: Verify login is not accessible without authentication
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthenticated login attempt
